parameters.name: mkey
parameters.description: If present, objects will be filtered on property with this name

parameters.name: vdom
parameters.description:
Specify the Virtual Domain(s) from which results are returned or changes are applied to. If this parameter is not provided, the management VDOM will be used. If the admin does not have access to the VDOM, a permission error will be returned.
The URL parameter is one of:
vdom=root (Single VDOM)
vdom=vdom1,vdom2 (Multiple VDOMs)
vdom=* (All VDOMs)

hsm-manufacturer.description: HSM manufacturer (select the HSM manufacturer. Currently, FortiWEB supports LUNA HSM, and Primus HSM, and more in the future)

hsm-ha.description: enable/disable Hsm HA for proxyd (Applied to LUNA HSM only)

dpdk.description: enable/disable DPDK receiving for offline proxyd

use-first-ack-mac.description: enable/disable TTP only insert macs to hash from first ack of three handshake

no-session-limit.description: not limit virtual machine max concurrency sessions

no-ssl-encrypt-then-mac.description: disable/enable ssl encrypt then mac extension

graceful-shutdown.description: disable/enable graceful shutdown of the peer connection

server-pool-connection-limit-log.description: disable/enable log when connection of the real server reaches the limit

tls13-early-data-mode.description: enable/disable tls13 early data for proxyd

record-content-routing-error-log.description: enable/disable event log when no content routing was matched

df-flag.description: disable/enable DF flag in ip header

using-dns-proxy.description: enable/disable use dnsproxy to resolve domain in proxyd

crldp-ttl-failed.description: Maximum time-to-live(ttl) of CRL distribution point in minutes for failed retrievals, default is 5 minutes(Minute, 1-60)

crldp-update-interval.description: The update interval of CRL distribution point, which ensures the CRL status is checked by this interval, default is 3 seconds(Second, 1-60)

rst-non-exist.description: enable/disable send TCP-RST to non-exist session

restrict-weak-sign-algo.description: enable/disable restricting weak signature algorithms, such as SHA-1 and SHA-224

parameters.description:
Specify the Virtual Domain(s) from which results are returned or changes are applied to. If this parameter is not provided, the management VDOM will be used. If the admin does not have access to the VDOM, a permission error will be returned.
The URL parameter is one of:
vdom=root (Single VDOM)
vdom=vdom1,vdom2 (Multiple VDOMs)
vdom=* (All VDOMs)

parameters.name: move_flag
parameters.description:
If supported, a flag can be specified.
When *move_flag* is set, extra parameters (*move_mkey*, *sub_mkey*) must be provided.
__*Note:*__ If this parameter is provided when not supported, the action will be ignored and an “invalid request” error will be returned.
